rationale: The cited study examines brand-related marketing information and stock-market firm value outcomes (abnormal returns and idiosyncratic risk), which directly matches the citing paper’s meta-analytic scope on marketing assets/brand-related constructs and firm value effects across studies from 1977–2013. Given the citing paper is a quantitative synthesis of prior econometric evidence and this is an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.12.0188), the citation is plausibly part of the substantive evidence base rather than a purely incidental mention.
